prime-student-us.description: Prime Student includes 6 months of Amazon Prime free, then 50% off. Get fast shipping, Prime Video, exclusive deals, and 5% back on select purchases with an eligible Prime Visa card.

proton-vpn-70pc.description: Students save 70% on Proton VPN, a Swiss-based service with a strict no-logs policy. Connect through 140+ countries, access blocked content, and stay private on campus Wi‑Fi or abroad.

prime-video-us.description: Prime Student members can stream Prime Video free for 6 months. Watch movies, series, and Amazon Originals on your laptop, phone, or TV.

grubhub-prime.description: Prime members get Grubhub+ free for 6 months with $0 delivery on eligible orders from thousands of restaurants. A solid perk for late-night study sessions.

apple-music-student.description: Students get Apple Music for half price and Apple TV+ included free. Verify enrollment to unlock the discounted rate for up to 48 months.

nordvpn-69pc.description: Save 69% on NordVPN plus get 3 extra months free. Secure your connection on campus Wi‑Fi, dorm networks, and public hotspots.

fizz-app.description: Mine helps students build credit and manage everyday spending without hidden fees. Built for college students who want to establish credit responsibly.

calm-prime-student.description: Try Calm free for 30 days, then continue for $3.50/month as a student. Access guided meditations, sleep stories, and stress-relief tools between classes.

aws-educate.description: AWS Educate offers free, self-paced cloud training and hands-on labs. Learn in-demand skills in cloud computing and AI with practice using services like S3 and EC2.

ynab-college.description: College students get one free year of YNAB (You Need A Budget). Track spending, plan ahead, and build better money habits—verify with a student ID, transcript, or tuition statement.

datacamp-student-50pc.description: Students save 50% on DataCamp. Access interactive courses in data science, Python, R, SQL, and AI to build job-ready skills at your own pace.

namecheap.description: Students can claim a free .me domain and discounts on other domains through Namecheap's education hub. Great for portfolios, side projects, and personal sites.

skillshare-30pc-annual.description: Get 30% off an annual Skillshare membership. Explore thousands of classes in design, video, marketing, illustration, and more.

squarespace-50pc.description: Students save 50% on the first year of Squarespace. Build a portfolio, blog, or project site with professional templates and drag-and-drop editing.

airalo-15pc.description: Save 15% on Airalo eSIMs for international travel. Stay connected abroad without swapping SIM cards or paying expensive roaming fees.

autodesk-edu-access.description: Students and educators get free access to Autodesk design software including AutoCAD, Fusion 360, and Maya. Verify student status annually to keep access.

hulu-199.description: College students get Hulu (With Ads) for $1.99/month while enrolled—about 83% off the regular price. Verify through SheerID; cancel anytime.

figma-education-plan.description: Figma and FigJam are free for students and educators. Design, prototype, and collaborate in real time—plus Dev Mode for learning how designs translate to code.

headspace-student-plan.description: Students save 85% on Headspace. Access meditation, sleep, and mindfulness tools to manage stress and burnout during the semester.

free-msft-365.description: Eligible students get Microsoft 365 apps—Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and OneNote—free with a valid school email. Sign in with your institutional account to get started.

evernote-40pc-professional.description: Students save 40% on Evernote Professional. Organize lecture notes, assignments, and group projects in one searchable workspace across all your devices.

lingvist-50pc.description: Students save 50% on Lingvist. Learn vocabulary in context with short, focused sessions designed to help you pick up a new language faster.

quizlet-plus.description: Try Quizlet Plus free for 7 days. Unlock ad-free studying, offline mode, and advanced learning tools to prep for exams and quizzes.

free-resume-builder.description: Kickresume offers students up to 180 days of Premium free. Build ATS-friendly resumes and cover letters—verify with ISIC, ITIC, or UNiDAYS.

blinkist-premium-25pc.description: Students save 25% on Blinkist Premium. Get key insights from thousands of nonfiction books and podcasts in about 15 minutes.

craft-for-education.description: Craft gives students a free note-taking app with offline support, course organization, and collaboration. Ideal for lectures, research, and group projects.

medium-25pc.description: Students save 25% on a one-year Medium membership. Read unlimited stories from writers across tech, culture, business, and more.

peacock-66pc.description: Students save 66% on Peacock streaming. Watch movies, TV, and live sports—stream on 3 devices and create up to 6 profiles.

jotform-edu.description: Jotform offers students unlimited survey submissions on its free education plan. Build custom forms for research, clubs, events, and class projects.

canva-free.description: Canva for Education is free for students. Create presentations, posters, social graphics, and more with thousands of templates and design tools.

rakuten-kobo-30pc.description: Students save 30% on select Kobo eBooks and audiobooks. Verify student status to browse discounted titles for class and leisure reading.

notion-edu.description: Notion for Education is free for students. Organize classes, clubs, internships, and side projects in one flexible workspace.

45pc-myprotein.description: Students get 45% off plus free shipping at MYPROTEIN with code MYPBEANS. Stock up on protein, snacks, and wellness supplements.

azure-for-students.description: Students receive $100 in Azure credit plus free access to popular cloud services. Build apps, host projects, and experiment with cloud tools at no cost.

40pc-hp-student.description: Students save up to 40% on HP laptops, printers, and accessories. Verify enrollment to access education pricing on back-to-school tech.

logitech-bts-24.description: Save up to $50 on Logitech back-to-school gear. Keyboards, mice, webcams, and headsets for your dorm desk or home setup.

25pc-chegg-study.description: New Chegg Study subscribers save 25% on the first month. Get step-by-step textbook solutions and expert Q&A for tough assignments.

fotor-free.description: Fotor offers free online photo editing for students. Touch up images, remove backgrounds, and create graphics for projects and social media.

21pc-nutribullet.description: Save 21% on nutribullet blenders. Quick smoothies and shakes for busy mornings between classes and late study nights.

lucidchart-edu.description: Students and educators get free Lucidchart Education accounts. Create flowcharts, diagrams, and process maps with real-time collaboration.

chegg-books.description: Save up to 90% on textbooks with Chegg. Rent or buy used books and eTextbooks instead of paying full campus bookstore prices.

chess-com-50pc-premium.description: Students save 50% on any Chess.com Premium plan. Verify with UNiDAYS to unlock unlimited puzzles, lessons, game review, and ad-free play.
